EnglishDescription: She was the daughter of Imam Husain (a) and the sister of Ali Asghar (a). Her mother’s name was Umme Rabab. Bibi Sakina had gone to Karbala with Imam Husain (a). She faced severe hardship after the tragedy of Karbala. She was also taken prisoner with the rest of Imam Husain (a)’s family and taken to Kufa and then to Shaam. Yazid soldiers tied her neck and she was also slapped. She died when she was still in prison and was first buried in the prison near Bani Ummayad but after many years, one scholar, saw Bibi Sakina (s) in his dream. She asked him to remove her body from the grave and bury her elsewhere because water was seeping in her grave. So, with the advises of other scholars, the man had the grave opened. They saw that indeed the water was filling the grave. When they brought the body out the grave they found it to be intact. The scholar held the body in his hands till another grave was dug at another location and buried her there and the rauza is now known as Bibi Ruqaya (s).
RUrduDescription: Bibi Sakina (s), Imam Husain (a) ki dukhtar aur Ali Asghar (a) ke bahen thi. Unki waaleda ka naam Umme Rabab tha. Bibi Sakina (s), Imam Husain (a) ke saath Karbala gayi. Waqeya-e-Karbala ka baad unko kaafi sakhti ka saamna karna pada. Imam Husain (a) ke khaanwaade ke saath Bibi (s) ko bhi qaidi bana kar Kufa aur phir Shaam le jaaya gaya. Yazid ke faujiyo’n ne unke galey mein rasan baandhi aur tamaache bhi lagaaye. Unki shahadat Yazid-e-maloon ke qaid khaane mein huwi aur unhe Bani Ummayya ke qareeb dafn kiya gaya. Lekin kuchh saal ke baad ek Aalim ne Bibi Sakina (s) ko khwaab mein dekha keh Bibi (s) kahe rahi hai keh unke jism mubarak ko us jagah se nikaal kar kahi aur dafn kare is liye keh paani unki qabr mein a raha hai. Us Aalim ne digar ulma se mashwara karte huwe us Bibi (s) ki qabr ko khola to dekha keh qabr mein paani bhara huwa hai. Us Aalim ne Bibi (s) ke jism mubarak ko apne haatho’n mein us waqt tak utha rakkha jab tak keh dusri jagah par qabr khodi gayi aur unhe dafn kiya gaya. Aaj unka rauza Bibi Ruqayya (s) ke naam se jaana jaata hai.

English: In the Name of Allah, the most Gracious, the most Merciful.
RUrdu: (Shuru karta hu) Allah ke naam se Jo bada maher-baan nehaayat rahem karne waala hai.
Urdu: اللہ کے نام سے (شروع کرتا ہوں) جو بڑا مہربا ن نہایت رحم کرنے والا ہے۔

English: Peace be on you, O daughter of the Messenger of Allah. Peace be on you, O the daughter of prophet in-chief. Peace be on you, O daughter of the owner of the Kausar and the banner. Peace be on you, O the daughter of him who went to Heaven to meet the Lord of the worlds and drew near Allah, at a distance of two bows length or even nearer.
RUrdu: Salaam ho aap par ay dukhtar’e Rasool'e Khuda (s.a.w.a). Salaam ho aap par ay dukhtar’e sultaan'e Ausiya (a.s). Salaam ho aap par ay dukhtar’e maalik'e Hauze Kausar o ilm ki. Salaam ho aap par ay dukhtar’e saaheb'e Meraj jo pohoncha manzil'e qaaba o qausen aw adna par.
Urdu: انشاء اللہ ترجمہ جلد آرہا ہے
RArabic: ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE YAA BINTA RASOOLILLAAHE ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE A BINTA SULTAANIL ANBEYAA-E ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE YAA BINTA SAAHEBIL HAWZE WAL-LEWAAA-E ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE YAA BINTA MAN A’RAJA ELAS SAMAAA-E WA WASALA ELAA QAABA QAWSAYNE AW ADNAA.
ArabicText1: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا بِنْتَ رَسُوْلِ اللہِ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا بِنْتَ سُلْطَانِ الْاَنْبِیَائِ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا بِنْتَ صَاحِبِ الْحَوْضِ وَاللِّوَآئِ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا بِنْتَ مَنْ عَرَجَ اِلٰی السَّمَآئِ وَ وَصَلَ اِلٰی قَابَ قَوْسَیْنِ اَوْ اَدْنٰی۔

English: Peace be on you, O daughter of the prophet who guided unto the right path, the master of all that has been created, who saved people from deviation and depravity. Peace be on you, O daughter of the most noble in pedigree and the superior most in genealogy, the most beautiful to look at, the most generous, the bravest, the most gentle, the most learned, the most pure in lineage, the most memorable, the most praiseworthy, whose attributes are most commendable.
RUrdu: Salaam ho aap par ay dukhtar'e Nabiye hidaayat aur sardaar'e khalq jo bando’n ko najaat dene waale ki, zalaalat aur halaakat se. Salaam ho aap par ay dukhtar buzurg-tareen khalq ki, ba-etebaar hasab keh aur afzal khalq ki, ba-etebaar nasab ke aur haseen tareen khalq ki, ba-etebaar illat (wajah) ke aur sakhi tareen ki, ba-etebaar ataa ke uski beti jo shuja tareen khalq hai, ba-etebaar qalb ke aur kaamil tareen khalq hai, ba-etebaar hilm ke sab se ziyadah hai ilm mein aur sab se ziyadah paayedaar, ba-etebaar asl ke aur sab se ziyadah buland, ba-etebaar zikr ke aur sab se ziyadah qaabil'e taarif, ba-etebaar majmuah ausaaf (tamaam sifate’n) ke aur sab se ziyadah qaabil’e taarif hai, ba-etebaar wasf ke.
RArabic: ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE YAA BINTA NABIYYIL HODAA WA SAYYEDIL WARAA WA MUNQEZIL E’BAADE MENAZ ZALAALATE WAR-RADAA ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE YAA BINTA AKRAMIL A’ALAMEENA HASABAN WA AFZALEHIM NASABAN WA AJMALEHIM MANZARAN WA AS-KHAAHUM KAFFAN WA ASH-JA-E’HIM QALBAN WA AKMALEHIM HILMAN WA AKSAREHIM I’LMAN WA ASBATEHIM ASLAN WA A-A’LAAHUM ZIKRAN WA ASNAAHUM ZUKHRAN WA AHMADAHUM WASFAN.
ArabicText1: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا بِنْتَ نَبِیِّ الْہُدٰی وَسَیِّدِ الْوَرٰی وَمُنْقِذِ الْعِبَادِ مِنَ الضَّلَالَۃِ وَالرَّدٰی۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا بِنْتَ اَکْرَمِ الْعَالَمِیْنَ حَسَبًا وَّاَفْضَلِہِمْ نَسَبًا وَّاَجْمَلِہِمْ مَنْظَرًا وَّاَسْخٰی ہُمْ کَفًّا وَّاَشْجَعِہِمْ قَلْبًا وَّاَکْمَلِہِمْ حِلْمًا وَّاَکْثَرِہِمْ عِلْمًا وَّاَثْبَتِہِمْ اَصْلًا وَّاَعْلٰی ہُمْ ذِکْرًا وَّاَثْنَاہُمْ ذُخْرًا وَّاَحْمَدَہُمْ وَصْفًا۔

English: Peace be on you, O daughter of him on account of whom Mina and Makka had been sanctified. Peace be on you, O daughter of the “ocean of knowledge” and the sanctuary of the saints. Peace be on you, O daughter of him who was born in Ka’ba, whose marriage was solemnised in the Heaven. Peace be on you, O daughter of the successor in-chief, the leader in-chief of awliya.
RUrdu: Salaam ho aap par ay dukhtar us buzurg waar ki jis se Makka aur Mina ne sharaf paaya. Salaam ho aap par ay dukhtar'e behrul uloom ki faqiro’n ke jaae panah ki. Salaam ho aap par ay dukhtar us buzurg ki jo Khaana'e Kaaba mein paiyda huwe aur jin ki tazweej aasmaan mein huwi. Salaam ho aap par ay dukhtar’e shah'e ausiya aur sardaar'e ausiya ki.
RArabic: ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE YAA BINTA BAHRIL O’LOOME WA KAHFIL FOQARAAA-E ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE YAA BINTA MAN WOLEDA FIL KA’BATE WA ZUWWEJA FIS SAMAAA-E ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE YAA BINTA SULTAANIL AWSEYAA-E WA SAYYEDIL AWLEYAAA-E ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE YAA BINTA SAARILLAAHE WABNE SAAREHI.
ArabicText1: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا بِنْتَ بَحْرِ الْعُلُوْمِ وَکَہْفِ الْفُقَرَآئِ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا بِنْتَ مَنْ وُلِدَ فِی الْکَعْبَۃِ وَزُوِّجَ فِی السَّمَآئِ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا بِنْتَ سُلْطَانِ الْاَوْصِیَائِ وَسَیِّدِ الْاَوْلِیَآئِ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا بِنْتَ ثَارِ اللہِ وَابْنِ ثَارِہٖ۔

English: Peace be on you, O the daughter of him whose blood claimer is Allah, whose father’s blood claimer is also Allah. Peace be on you, O the heart and soul of the leader of the youths of paradise. Peace be on you, O daughter of Fatima Zahra, chief of the women of the worlds, O daughter of Khadijatul Kubra, the mother of believers.
RUrdu: Salaam ho aap par ay dukhtar us buzurg-waar ki jis ke khoon ka taalib Khuda hai. Salaam ho aap par ay dukhtar'e Hazrat Sayyadush Shohoda ki. Salaam ho aap par ay paara’e jigar us buzurg-waar ki jo sardaar hai tamaam jawanaan'e Jannat ka. Salaam ho aap par ay dukhtar'e Hazrat Fatema Zahra (s.a) ki jo sardaar hai tamaam aalam ki aurto’n ki. Salaam ho aap par ay dukhtar Janabe Khadijatul Kubra (s.a) ki jo Ummul Momin hai.
RArabic: ASSALAAM A’LAYKE YAA BINTA SAYYEDISH-SHO-HADAAA-E ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE YAA BAZ-A’TE SAYYEDE SHABAABE AHLIL JANNATE ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE YAA BINTA FAATEMATAZ ZAHRAAA-E SAYYEDATE NESAAA-IL A’ALAMEENA ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE YAA BINTA KHADEEJATIL KUBRAA UMMIL MOMINEENA.
ArabicText1: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا بِنْتَ سَیِّدِ الشُّہَدَآئِ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا بَضْعَۃِ سَیِّدِ شَبَابِ اَہْلِ الْجَنَّۃِ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا بِنْتَ فَاطِمَۃَ الزَّہْرَآئِ سَیِّدَۃِ نِسَائِ الْعَالَمِیْنَ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا بِنْتَ خَدِیْجَۃِ الْکُبْرٰی اُمِّ الْمُؤْمِنِیْنَ۔

English: Peace be on you, O Sakina daughter of Umme Rabab, and mercy and benediction of Allah. Peace be on you, the pious and pure. Peace be on you, who was thoroughly learned at tender age. Peace be on you, who was noble and celebrated. Peace be on you, who was far away from her home.
RUrdu: Salaam ho aap par ay Janabe Sakina (s.a) dukhtar’e Janabe Umme Rabab ki, Khuda ki rehmat ho aap par aur Uski barkaat. Salaam ho aap par ay muttaqi aur parhez-gaar bibi. Salaam ho aap par ay woh bibi jo kamsini hi mein faazela (aalema) thi. Salaam ho aap par ay buzurgi aur shaan waali shehzaadi. Salaam ho aap par ay woh mazlooma jo zulm ke saath shaheed ki gayi. Salaam ho aap par ay ghareebul watan bibi.
RArabic: ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE YAA SAKEENATA BINTA UMME RABBABIN WA RAHMATULLAAHE WA BARAKAATOHU ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE AYYATOHAT TAQIYYATUN NAQIYYATO ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE AYYATOHAL FAAZELATUS SAGHEERATO ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE AYYATOHAL KAREEMATUL BAHIYYATO ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE AYYATOHAL MAZLOOMATUSH SHA-HEEDATO.
ArabicText1: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا سَکِیْنَۃَ بِنْتَ اُمِّ رَبَابٍ وَّرَحْمَۃُ اللہِ وَبَرَکَاتُہٗ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ اَیَّتُہَا التَّقِیَّۃُ الْنَّقِیَّۃُ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ اَیَّتُہَا الْفَاضِلَۃُ الصَّغِیْرَۃُ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ اَیَّتُہَا الْکَریْمَۃُ الْبَہِیَّۃُ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ اَیَّتُہَا الْمَظْلُوْمَۃُ الشَّہِیْدَۃُ۔

English: Peace be on you, who was taken to towns as a prisoner. Peace be on you, who had been put to severe trials, who gave her life for the sake of her father after giving a comprehensive lecture and then said: “O father, O father, who was he who made me an orphan at a tender age. O father, O father, who was he who cut your jugular vein?”
RUrdu: Salaam ho aap par ay woh bibi jo qaid kar ke dar pa dar phiraayi gayi. Salaam ho aap par ay imtehaan'e azeem mein aur aazmaaish mein kaamyaab hone waali shehzaadi aur jis ne apne nafs ko apne baap par qurbaan kar diya baad behtareen taqreer kar ke aur kaha baba, ay baba kis zaalim ne mujhe is kamsini mein yateem kar diya, baba, ay baba kis zaalim ne aap ki rag'e gardan ko kat’a kiya (kaata).
RArabic: ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE AYYATOHAL BA-E’EDATO A’NIL AWTAANE ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE AYYATOHAL ASEERATO FIL-BULDAANE ASSALAAMO A’LAYKE YAA MUMTAHANATO BE-IMTEHAANIL A’ZEEMATE WA FA-DAA-HAA NAFSAHAA LE-ABEEHAA WA WAREEDAHAA.
ArabicText1: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ اَیَّتُہَا الْبَعِیْدَۃُ عَنِ الْاَوْطَانِ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ اَیَّتُہَا الْاَسِیْرَۃُ فِی الْبُلْدَانِ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَیْکِ یَا مُمْتَحَنَۃُ بِاِمْتَحَانِ الْعَظِیْمَۃِ وَفَدَاہَا نَفْسَہَا لِاَبِیْہَا وَوَرِیْدَہَا۔

English: Peace be on you, who died in the love of Sayyadus Shohada, and on her death the Ahlulbait went into deep mourning in the desolate city of Syria, this was the time of trial and tribulation. Peace be on her, who had left this world to meet her father and ancestor in paradise. Mercy and blessings of Allah be on her.
RUrdu: Salaam ho us shehzaadi par jo mohabbat'e Hazrat sayyadush shohoda mein mar gayi aur jis ke inteqaal se Ahlebait'e Athaar mein qayaamat barpa huwi kharaabah'e Shaam (gair'e abaad) mein aur yeh wohi maqaam’e imtehaan o aazmaaish hai. Salaam ho us bibi par jo mulhaq huwi apne jad'e buzurg-waar aur apne pidar aaliqadaar se Jannat mein aur Khuda ki rehmate’n ho aur Uski barkaat.
RArabic: ASSALAAMO A’LAA MAM MAATA MIN SHIDDATISH-SHAWQE FEE MAHABBATE SAYYEDISH SHOHA-DAA-E WA QAAMAT QEYAAMATO AHLIL BAYTE BE-MAWTEHAA FEE KHARAABA- TISH-SHAAME WA HEYA MAW-ZE-A’L MUMTAHANATE WAL BALAAA-E ASSALAAMO A’LAA MAL-LAHEQAT ELAA JADDEHAA WA ABEEHAA FEE DAARIL KAREEMATE WA LIL-LEQAAA-E WA RAHMATULLAAHE WA BARAKAATOH.
ArabicText1: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰی مَنْ مَّاتَ مِنْ شِدَّۃِ الشَّوْقِ فِیْ مَحَبَّۃِ سَیِّدِ الشُّہَدَائِ وَقَامَتْ قِیَامَۃُ اَہْلِ الْبَیْتِ بِمَوْتِہَا فِی خَرَابَۃِ الشَّامِ وَہِیَ مَوْضَعِ الْمُمْتَحَنَۃِ وَالْبَلَآئِ۔ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰی مَنْ لَّحِقَتْ اِلٰی جَدِّہَا وَاَبِیْہَا فِیْ دَارِالْکَرَامَۃِ وَاللِّقَآئِ وَرَحْمَۃُ اللہِ وَ بَرَکَاتُہٗ۔

English: Allah’s (s.w.t) choicest blessings be upon Mohammed and his holy progeny.
RUrdu: Parwardigaar Tu rehmat naazil farma Hazrat Muhammad (s.a.w.a) aur unki Aal (a.s) par.
Urdu: اے معبود! رحمت نازل فرما حضرت محمدؐ اور انکی آل ؑپر۔
RArabic: ALLAHUMMA SWALLE ALAA MUHAMMADIW WA AALE MUHAMMADIN
ArabicText1: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ۔

EnglishDescription: Then recite 2 rakats Namaz-e-Ziyarat like Fajr namaz.
RUrduDescription: Phir 2 rakat Namaz-e-Ziyarat, Fajr namaz ki tarah padhe.
UrduDescription: پھر ۲ رکعت نماز زیارت (نماز فجر کی طرح) پڑھے۔
